PokerStars Zoom Hand #244112233445:  Hold'em No Limit ($0.25/$0.50 USD) - 2024/02/03 14:02:55 ET
Table 'Donati' 6-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: villain_btn ($50.00 in chips)
Seat 2: smallb ($62.10 in chips)
Seat 3: Hero ($50.00 in chips)
Seat 4: utg_guy ($48.75 in chips)
Seat 5: hj_man ($50.00 in chips)
Seat 6: co_lady ($55.25 in chips)
smallb: posts small blind $0.25
Hero: posts big blind $0.50
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [Ah Kd]
utg_guy: folds
hj_man: folds
co_lady: folds
villain_btn: raises $0.75 to $1.25
smallb: folds
Hero: calls $0.75
*** FLOP *** [Kc 7d 2c]
Hero: checks
villain_btn: bets $1.50
Hero: calls $1.50
*** TURN *** [Kc 7d 2c] [5h]
Hero: checks
villain_btn: bets $3.75
Hero: calls $3.75
*** RIVER *** [Kc 7d 2c 5h] [9s]
Hero: checks
villain_btn: checks
*** SHOW DOWN ***
Hero: shows [Ah Kd] (a pair of Kings)
villain_btn: mucks hand
Hero collected $12.65 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $13.25 | Rake $0.60
Board [Kc 7d 2c 5h 9s]
Seat 1: villain_btn (button) mucked [Qd Jd]
Seat 2: smallb (small blind) folded before Flop
Seat 3: Hero (big blind) showed [Ah Kd] and won ($12.65) with a pair of Kings
